abilities.name: Daimyo
abilities.description: Friendly Minions within a6 gain + to melee (y) attacks.

abilities.name: Reading the Wind
abilities.description: First Focus during turn gains additional Focused +1.

actions: (1) Daito (Melee) | AV: 6 (15) | Rg: y2 | Resist: Df | Target suffers 2/3/5 damage, ignoring Armor. Ram Critical Strike: +1 per Ram. Crow Twist: Damage flip gains +.

(1) Custom Shoulder Gatling (Heavy Guns) | AV: 5 (14) | Rg: z14 | Resist: Df | Target suffers 2/3b/4bb. Gains + to attack. Wielder gains + to Intimidate. Ram Stutter Fire: After damaging, attack different target. Capacity 8, Reload 4.
(2) Run Through (Athletics) | Move Charge Aspect yards, single 1 AP Close Combat, move again.
system.notes: Powerful Japanese nobles serving Ten Thunders. Willingly or under duress. Powered armor like ancient samurai. Wield daito + shoulder-mounted Gatling.
